Entry.JapaneseText: こんな場所に隠れてたのか、ルーク
Entry.EnglishText: So this is where you were hiding, Luke.

Entry.JapaneseText: な、なんだよ？ また俺を責めに来たのかよ？ 俺に……俺にどうしろっていうんだよ？
Entry.EnglishText: Wh-What? Did you come here to blame me again? What do you... want me to even do?

Entry.JapaneseText: 言われた通りやっただけなんだぞ！ こんな風になるなんて思わなかったんだ！
Entry.EnglishText: I just did what I was told to do! I had no idea it was gonna end up like this!

Entry.JapaneseText: そうだとしても…… たくさんの人が死んでしまったのは事実だ
Entry.EnglishText: Even if that's the case... it's still the truth that a lot of people died.

Entry.JapaneseText: ルーク、その事実を受け止めるんだ。 お前は……罪を犯したんだよ
Entry.EnglishText: Luke, you need to accept that reality. You... committed a crime.

Entry.JapaneseText: ふ、ふざけんな！ ガイだってあんとき一緒にいたじゃねぇかよ！ なのに悪いのは俺一人かよ！
Entry.EnglishText: D-Don't fuck around! You were there with me when it happened! So why am I the only one at fault for this?!

Entry.JapaneseText: そうは言ってない。 もちろんお前を止められなかった 俺にだって責任はある
Entry.EnglishText: I didn't say you were. Since I wasn't able to stop you from doing it, naturally I'm responsible, too.

Entry.JapaneseText: 俺には、俺には責任なんてねぇ！ 知らなかったんだ！ だからしょうがねぇだろ！！
Entry.EnglishText: I... I'm not responsible for this at all! I had no idea! So there's nothing I could've done!
Kh. Now we have a monster to deal with?!
